name: Professional Diversity Network, Inc.
business: Professional Diversity Network, Inc. operates online professional networking communities with career resources tailored to diverse cultural groups, a women-only professional networking organization (NAPW), and a remote-hiring marketplace for software developers (RemoteMore). The company also began pursuing Web3.0, digital asset, and music copyright initiatives in 2025.
sellsTo: employers seeking to diversify their workforce

exposures.sentence: We use artificial intelligence (AI) technologies in our platform to enhance functionality and increase engagement among employers and job seekers.
In 2025, we began evaluating and pursuing certain initiatives relating to Web3.0 technologies, digital assets, and RWA tokenization.
Since September 2025, the Company has acquired the copyrights to 28 original musical works.
RemoteMore, which connects companies with reliable, cost-efficient developers with less effort and friction, and empowers software developers to get meaningful jobs regardless of their location.
